description: Lists properties and responses of hybrid bolt elements in the range. If no keyword is given, the default output of the command is that associated with the information keyword.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Lists properties and responses of hybrid bolt elements in the range. If no keyword is given, the default output of the command is that associated with the information keyword.

keywords.name: apply
keywords.description: axial tension that will be maintained during cycling

keywords.name: dowel
keywords.description: list of dowels associated with each element in the range

keywords.name: force-axial
keywords.description: axial force in the bolt (average of the two end forces)

keywords.name: force-node
keywords.description: generalized nodal forces (force and moment) acting on the element. These are the generalized forces exerted by the nodes on the element.

keywords.name: force-node-local
keywords.description: express the values in the element coordinate system (the default)

keywords.name: force-node-global
keywords.description: express the values in the global coordinate system

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: group assignment(s). If slot is specified, then list the group assignment, if any, in slot s.

keywords.name: grout
keywords.description: information about the grout that is modeled as coupling springs that connect the bolt to the target object (zones in FLAC3D and 3DEC, and particles in PFC3D): confinement, displacement, stress, yield state and average axial direction

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: general element information: nodal connectivity, centroid, surface area, volume, and hide/select status

keywords.name: length
keywords.description: length of the bolt

keywords.name: property-cross-sectional-area
keywords.description: cross-sectional area

keywords.name: property-density
keywords.description: mass density

keywords.name: property-grout-cohesion
keywords.description: grout cohesion (force units) per unit length

keywords.name: property-grout-friction
keywords.description: grout friction angle

keywords.name: property-grout-perimeter
keywords.description: grout exposed perimeter

keywords.name: property-grout-stiffness
keywords.description: grout stiffness per unit length

keywords.name: property-slide
keywords.description: large-strain sliding flag

keywords.name: property-slide-tolerance
keywords.description: large-strain sliding tolerance

keywords.name: property-tensile-failure-strain
keywords.description: tensile failure strain

keywords.name: property-thermal-expansion
keywords.description: thermal expansion coefficient

keywords.name: property-yield-compression
keywords.description: compressive yield strength

keywords.name: property-yield-tension
keywords.description: tensile yield strength

keywords.name: property-young
keywords.description: Young’s modulus

keywords.name: property-young-dowel-active-length
keywords.description: Active length of dowel segments [L]

keywords.name: property-young-dowel-failure-strain
keywords.description: Dowel shear strain limit [-]

keywords.name: property-young-dowel-stiffness
keywords.description: Dowel shear stiffness [F/L]

keywords.name: property-young-dowel-yield
keywords.description: Dowel shear yield strength [F]

keywords.name: stress
keywords.description: axial stress in the hybrid bolt element (not to be confused with stress in the grout)

keywords.name: system-local
keywords.description: element local coordinate system

keywords.name: yield
keywords.description: yield state indicating whether or not the hybrid bolt element has yielded
